‘The Life of a Showgirl’ is released
subtitle: Album by Taylor Swift
fact: The Life of a Showgirl is the twelfth studio album by the American singer-songwriter Taylor Swift.

title: ‘Abbey Road’ is released
subtitle: Album by The Beatles
fact: Abbey Road is the eleventh studio album by the English rock band the Beatles, released on 26 September 1969, by Apple Records.

title: ‘The Dark Side of the Moon’ is released
subtitle: Album by Pink Floyd
fact: The Dark Side of the Moon is the eighth studio album by the English progressive rock band Pink Floyd, released on 1 March 1973 by Capitol Records in the US and on 16 March 1973 by Harvest Records in the UK.

title: ‘Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band’ is released
subtitle: Album by The Beatles
fact: Sgt.

title: ‘Thriller’ is released
subtitle: Album by Michael Jackson
fact: Thriller is the sixth studio album by the American singer and songwriter Michael Jackson.

title: ‘Let It Be’ is released
subtitle: Album by The Beatles
fact: Let It Be is the twelfth and final studio album by the English rock band the Beatles.

title: ‘The Beatles’ is released
subtitle: Album by The Beatles
fact: The Beatles is the ninth studio album and only double album by the English rock band the Beatles, released on 22 November 1968.

title: ‘The Wall’ is released
subtitle: Album by Pink Floyd
fact: The Wall is the eleventh studio album by the English rock band Pink Floyd, released on 30 November 1979 by Harvest/EMI and Columbia/CBS Records.

title: ‘Rumours’ is released
subtitle: Album by Fleetwood Mac
fact: Rumours is the eleventh studio album by the British and American rock band Fleetwood Mac, released on 4 February 1977, by Warner Bros.

title: ‘Revolver’ is released
subtitle: Album by The Beatles
fact: Revolver is the seventh studio album by the English rock band the Beatles.

title: ‘Master of Puppets’ is released
subtitle: Album by Metallica
fact: Master of Puppets is the third studio album by American heavy metal band Metallica, released on March 3, 1986, by Elektra Records.

title: ‘Band on the Run’ is released
subtitle: Album by Wings
fact: Band on the Run is the third studio album by the British rock band Paul McCartney and Wings, released on 30 November 1973 in the United Kingdom and 5 December 1973 in the United States.

title: ‘Mother's Milk’ is released
subtitle: Album by Red Hot Chili Peppers
fact: Mother's Milk is the fourth studio album by American rock band Red Hot Chili Peppers, released on August 16, 1989, by EMI Records.

title: ‘Blood Sugar Sex Magik’ is released
subtitle: Album by Red Hot Chili Peppers
fact: Blood Sugar Sex Magik is the fifth studio album by American rock band Red Hot Chili Peppers, released on September 24, 1991, by Warner Bros.

title: ‘Rubber Soul’ is released
subtitle: Album by The Beatles
fact: Rubber Soul is the sixth studio album by the English rock band the Beatles.

title: ‘Wish You Were Here’ is released
subtitle: Album by Pink Floyd
fact: Wish You Were Here is the ninth studio album by the English rock band Pink Floyd, released on 12 September 1975 through Harvest Records in the United Kingdom and a day later in the United States through Columbia Records, as their first album for the label.

title: ‘Harry's House’ is released
subtitle: Album by Harry Styles
fact: Harry's House is the third studio album by the English singer and songwriter Harry Styles, released on 20 May 2022 by Erskine and Columbia Records.

title: ‘Nebraska’ is released
subtitle: Album by Bruce Springsteen
fact: Nebraska is the sixth studio album by the American singer-songwriter Bruce Springsteen, released on September 30, 1982, through Columbia Records.

title: ‘Gorillaz’ is released
subtitle: Album by Gorillaz
fact: Gorillaz is the debut album by the English virtual band Gorillaz, released on 26 March 2001 in the United Kingdom by Parlophone and on 19 June 2001 in the United States by Virgin Records.

title: ‘Demon Days’ is released
subtitle: Album by Gorillaz
fact: Demon Days is the second studio album by the British virtual band Gorillaz.

title: ‘Ram’ is released
subtitle: Album by Paul & Linda McCartney
fact: Ram is the only studio album credited to the spousal music duo Paul and Linda McCartney, and the former's second solo album after leaving the Beatles.

title: ‘Nevermind’ is released
subtitle: Album by Nirvana
fact: Nevermind is the second studio album and major label debut by American rock band Nirvana, released on September 24, 1991, by DGC Records.

title: ‘The Uplift Mofo Party Plan’ is released
subtitle: Album by Red Hot Chili Peppers
fact: The Uplift Mofo Party Plan is the third studio album by American rock band Red Hot Chili Peppers, released on September 29, 1987, by EMI Manhattan.

title: ‘Please Please Me’ is released
subtitle: Album by The Beatles
fact: Please Please Me is the debut studio album by English rock band the Beatles.
